name: John R Lepley & Sons
fleet_size_est: 10-20 (72-pass buses + 9-seat vans; exact count not disclosed)
districts_or_customers: Local Venango County school districts (Cooperstown/Franklin area)
recent_news: Operating 50+ years per company website; no M&A or news flow identified through 2026.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (founded 1954) family-owned western PA operator with diversified school + charter + mechanical revenue. Very small (~6 employees, ~$200K revenue) — too sub-scale for a standalone tuck-in but possibly a route-pick-up in a Venango/Crawford County rollup. Multi-generational ownership suggests succession potential.

name: Sutton Bus & Truck Co Inc
employees_est: 50-100 (reported 3 in source data appears understated vs 70+ bus fleet)
recent_news: Family-owned and operated for four generations since 1952; no M&A activity identified through 2026.
fit_notes: Attractive tuck-in: 70+ bus fleet, two of Delaware's largest districts (Red Clay, Christina) as customers, 4th-generation family ownership (succession optic), single-state Wilmington footprint. Source revenue/employee figures likely DUNS-stub underestimates — true scale is much larger. Strong candidate for Summit's Mid-Atlantic platform.

name: J & S Children's Trnsprtn
recent_news: Yelp listing as of April 2026 shows business as CLOSED; status uncertain. Website schooltransportationjs.com still live but activity unclear.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a fit. Micro-scale door-to-door van service rather than yellow-bus contractor; Yelp marks as closed in 2026. Even if operating, ~$180K revenue and family/owner-operator scale below Summit's tuck-in threshold.

name: Carlos-Susana Sch Bus Svc Corp
principals: Carlos and Susana (founder-namesakes; last names not publicly disclosed)
recent_news: FMCSA snapshot shows 58 power units / 76 drivers — a meaningful contractor for M-DCPS. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Strong FL tuck-in candidate: ~58 buses, certified Miami-Dade contractor (one of nation's largest districts), Broward overlap, branded operation with website. Founder-couple (founded 2000) implies ~25 yrs of operation and possible succession optic. Source revenue/employee data in seed list (4 emp / $178K) is materially understated vs FMCSA scale.

name: D & J Hauling Inc
districts_or_customers: Local Dearborn County / Lawrenceburg-area district contracts (likely South Dearborn or Lawrenceburg Community Schools)
recent_news: In school bus business since 2002 per D&B; related entity Scudder Hauling Solutions also operating in Lawrenceburg. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Very small SE Indiana single-route operator (~$168K revenue, ~4 employees). Owner Dennis Scudder also runs a moving/hauling business — bus may be a side operation. Sub-scale for standalone tuck-in; only relevant as route pickup in a southern Indiana rollup.
